eyebrow.zh: 离线 · 零 API key · 秒级

headline.zh:
在 agent 读代码前
拦住藏起来的注入
headline.en:
Catch hidden injection
before your agent reads

sub.zh: PromptShield 在 Claude Code / Cursor 读取仓库、diff 或 PR 之前，把代码里当作提示词的注释、docstring、commit message 扫一遍，命中任何 HIGH 就让 CI 变红。
sub.en: Before Claude Code or Cursor reads a repo, diff or PR, PromptShield scans the comments, docstrings and commit messages your agent will treat as prompts — any HIGH turns CI red.

body.zh: Collectors 把仓库 / git diff / PR JSON 拆成 agent 真正会读到的 Surface —— 注释、docstring、commit message、markdown、配置、字符串字面量 —— 再逐段扫描。
body.en: Collectors split a repo, git diff or PR JSON into the surfaces an agent actually reads — comments, docstrings, commit messages, markdown, config, string literals — then scans each one.

title.zh: 五类注入 + requires 门控

body.zh: YAML 规则引擎把每段 Surface 映射成 instruction_override / data_destructive / exfiltration / tool_abuse / obfuscation 五类 Finding；高噪声规则用 requires 二次门控压误报，精度优先于召回。
body.en: A YAML rule engine maps each surface into five classes — instruction override, data destructive, exfiltration, tool abuse, obfuscation — with a requires second gate on noisy rules to keep precision over recall.

body.zh: 每段 Surface 还会过一遍解码 —— base64 / hex / 零宽字符剥离 / 同形字归一化后的变体重新扫描，藏在编码层背后的注入照样命中；--no-decode 可关。
body.en: Every surface also runs through a decode pass — base64, hex, zero-width stripping and homoglyph normalization are rescanned, so an injection hidden behind an encoding layer is still caught; --no-decode turns it off.

body.zh: 任何 HIGH 即 exit 1 让 CI 失败；--format sarif 输出 SARIF 2.1.0 上传到 GitHub Security；scan 不需要 git 或 gh，也不发网络请求。
body.en: Any HIGH exits 1 to fail CI; --format sarif emits SARIF 2.1.0 for the GitHub Security tab; scan needs no git or gh and makes no network calls.

headline.zh: 在 CI 里卡住注入面
headline.en: Gate the injection surface in CI

sub.zh: MIT 许可，pip install promptshield 即用；把仓库自带的 workflow 复制进去，每个 PR 自动门控。
sub.en: MIT-licensed, pip install promptshield; copy the bundled workflow in and every PR is gated.
